column1: Hasta 2028 se pretende lograr que las cuencas priorizadas como estratégicas en Bolivia incluyan en sus estrategias de manejo, el concepto de restauración y cobertura de laderas y aforestación en zonas sin previa cobertura forestal y de clase agrológica VII, abarcando al menos 100.000 ha (1.000 km2)
column2: Until 2028 it is intended to achieve that prioritized basins as strategic in Bolivia include in their management strategies the concept of restoration and hillside coverage and afforestation in areas without previous forest cover and of agrological class VII, covering at least 100,000 hectares (1,000 km2)
column5: Participation in the LDN Target Setting Programme

column1: Hasta 2028 se han establecido acciones concretas para la preservación, conservación y aprovechamiento sostenible de zonas de vida de condiciones limitantes por medio del manejo de praderas nativas ubicadas en el altiplano boliviano, para mejorar y recuperar la disponibilidad de forrajes nativos y también por medio de la búsqueda del manejo sostenible de humedales para promover el manejo de la biodiversidad local, con lo que se pretende recuperar al menos 20.000 ha (200 km2) de tierras degradadas
column2: Concrete actions have been established until 2028 for the preservation, conservation, and sustainable use of life zones with limiting conditions through the management of native grasslands located in the Bolivian highlands, to improve and recover the availability of native forages and also through the search for sustainable wetland management to promote the management of local biodiversity, with the aim of recovering at least 20,000 hectares (200 km2) of degraded land.
column5: Participation in the LDN Target Setting Programme

column1:
Le reboisement- boisement annuel de 3100 ha pour compenser les pertes annuelles en terres forestières évaluée à environ 5300 ha par an (FRA 2010 et 2015). Les efforts seront orientés en particulier vers la restauration des forêts classées et la création des plantations sous forme des gommeraies et bois villageois.
Il s'agit d'une cible d'INDC 2020-2030 et du SNEDD 2017-2021
column2:
Reforestation - annual reforestation of 3100 ha to compensate for the annual losses in forest land estimated at about 5300 ha per year (FRA 2010 and 2015). Efforts will be focused particularly on the restoration of classified forests and the creation of plantations in the form of rubber plantations and village forests.
This is a target of the INDC 2020-2030 and the SNEDD 2017-2021.
